since_last: 38% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +2.59%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.69% · BTC -2.80% · Gold -2.40% · Nasdaq100 -1.78%. 38% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +2.59%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +2.59%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.78%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: APP is the standout at -11.94%
cards.body: Leaders: INTU +7.38%, WDAY +5.20%, CRM +5.11%, SNOW +3.84%, NOW +3.68%. Laggards: APP -11.94%, MRVL -7.95%, ARM -7.58%, SMR -7.41%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.82% at $138.3
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.82% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
